raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The DELETE Act would create a one-stop-shop website for Californians to control access to their personal information.",
    "Data brokers possess thousands of data points on consumers and can use this data related to sensitive topics.",
    "Data brokers collect, analyze, and sell personal information about consumers by aggregating data from various sources.",
    "Data brokers in California are required to register with the Attorney General but do not have to report the types of information they collect and sell.",
    "Under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), consumers have the right to require a data broker to delete information collected directly from them."
  ]
}
```
